themes.exampleQuote: One of the widest tea selections I have ever seen.
A wonderful pseudo-third space where you can sip tea, relax, play a board game, study, and talk to other patrons.
Staff is extremely friendly and knowledgeable about tea.
It's hard to get a seat sometimes because it's crowded.

notable_quote: One of my favorite places on Earth: a wonderfully large selection of teas from around the world, served in an intimate and quiet setting.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently praise the depth of the tea menu, the unhurried atmosphere, and a staff that actually knows the product; the one recurring friction is seating scarcity during busy hours.
quarter_narrative: Ten Pittsburgh creators filed TikToks at Dobrá Tea this quarter, racking up nearly 10,000 plays on 11 videos, with the Bombay chai pulling the sharpest individual clip. The tea house itself posted once to Instagram in the last 30 days and has no TikTok account, so every frame of that creator footage exists entirely outside its control. Sitting at number one in Pittsburgh tea houses and sixth in the broader cafe family, Dobrá already holds the strongest review sentiment in the tier; the rank that matters next, cracking the top three in cafes behind family leader Allegheny Coffee and Tea Exchange, whose social momentum is the benchmark, depends almost entirely on whether Pittsburgh stops discovering Dobrá through other people's phones.
tldr_read: Review sentiment near the top of the family, Instagram nearly quiet, and ten creators filming without a single reel in return. Ones to Watch, #1 in Pittsburgh Tea Houses.
tldr_meaning: The review foundation is already there; the gap between creator-generated reach and the business's own output is the variable that will determine whether this rank holds or climbs.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Ten Creators Filmed The Bombay Chai. Dobrá Tea Has No TikTok Account.

playbook.headline: Claim a TikTok presence before momentum fades
playbook.action: Ten creators have already built the visual template; a business account lets Dobrá redirect that 9,656-play body of work toward a profile it owns.

playbook.headline: Restart Instagram with a weekly reel minimum
playbook.action: One post in 30 days and zero reels leaves a 2.76% engagement rate with nothing to compound; a single weekly short video of a tea preparation or menu walkthrough changes that math.

playbook.headline: Tag creators who already filmed here
playbook.action: Accounts like @alexgdeckerr and @kyuramen.pittsburgh posted without any documented response; a reshare or reply converts existing reach into a repeating relationship.
